    textproc/xml2rfc: Update to 3.19.4

    See https://github.com/ietf-tools/xml2rfc/releases/tag/v3.19.4 for a

    Additionally, update the pkg-message to point to another xml2rfx
    reference (thanks to John Levine for the suggestion)..

    PR:             276929
